title: glicophyllum salicifolium
intro: Glicophyllum salicifolium, also known as the willow-leaved licorice vine, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glicophyllum salicifolium are said to include relief from skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
